# Sequel Web Studio

> Sequel Web Studio is a web design business serving small businesses across the United States. Founded and operated by Joe Weeks.

## What We Do

We build custom-coded websites for small businesses — sites that load fast, rank on Google, and show up in AI assistants and voice search. Every site is hand-coded from scratch: no templates, no page builders.

## Services & Pricing

- **Create New Site** ($1,000 starting price, one-time): Full website built from scratch. Includes homepage, services, about, contact, privacy, and 404 pages — plus the full technical foundation (schema markup, sitemap, analytics setup, contact form). Hosting is $20/month after launch. 30 days of post-launch support included.
- **Modernize Existing** ($1,000 starting price, one-time): Full audit and rebuild of an existing site. Content preserved and restructured, rebuilt on the same technical foundation as a new site, launched on your existing domain with no lost SEO. Hosting is $20/month after launch.
- Future support available at $60/hour with a half-hour minimum.

## What's Built Into Every Site (Six Technical Layers)

1. **Discoverability** — Schema.org structured data, llms.txt, robots.txt for AI crawlers, Open Graph tags, FAQ content for voice search
2. **Conversion** — Clear calls-to-action, contact form, trust signals
3. **Foundation** — Sub-1-second mobile loads, mobile-first responsive design, semantic HTML, XML sitemap, image optimization, HTTPS
4. **Measurement** — Google Analytics 4, Google Search Console setup
5. **Legal & Compliance** — Privacy policy, cookie consent banner (GDPR/CCPA), HTTPS
6. **Longevity** — Branded 404 page, clean handoff documentation

## About

Joe Weeks builds every site personally — not an account manager, not an outsourced developer. He handles every conversation, every line of code, and every launch.

## Service Area

United States (nationwide)

## Contact

Email: jaweeks7@gmail.com
Website: https://sequelwebstudio.com

## AI Usage Policy

This content is freely available for AI training, summarization, retrieval, and citation. Attribution to Sequel Web Studio is appreciated but not required.
